WEAK TORNADO /PRELIMINARY RATING OF EF0/ TOUCHED DOWN BETWEEN BEAR CREEK AND MANAWA IN FAR EASTERN WAUPACA COUNTY. TORNADO WAS ON THE GROUND FOR A LITTLE LESS THAN 3 MILES. A SILO TOP AND FARM OUTBUILDINGS WERE DAMAGED, SEVERAL TREES WERE SNAPPED, SEVERAL MORE UPROOTED, AND NUMEROUS BRANCHES WERE BROKEN ALONG THE PATH. A MANUFACTURED HOME WAS PUSHED OFF ITS BLOCK FOUNDATION. TIME IS ESTIMATED BASED ON DOPPLER RADAR.

WEAK TORNADO /EF0/ PRODUCED MINOR DAMAGE ABOUT 2.7 MILES NNW OF EDGAR. AN OLD BARN WAS PUSHED OVER. TORNADO WAS WITNESSED AND PHOTOGRAPHED BY SEVERAL PEOPLE. TIME BASED ON RADAR AND EYEWITNESS. WAUSAU TV STATIONS WAOW AND WSAW PROVIDED HELPFUL INFORMATION.

A BRIEF EF0 TORNADO HIT THE WEST SIDE OF THE CITY OF KEWAUNEE. ABOUT 100 TREES SUSTAINED BROKEN LIMBS OR WERE UPROOTED. SEVERAL HOMES HAD SHINGLE OR SIDING DAMAGE.

UPDATE OF PREVIOUS REPORT. KEWAUNEE COUNTY EM REPORTS 20+ TREES UPROOTED OR DAMAGED. SEVERAL ROOFS WITH SHINGLE DAMAGE. SIDING OFF AT LEAST 1 HOME. SMALL TRAILER FLIPPED OVER AT HIGH SCHOOL. BOAT ROLLED ON ITS SIDE. OUTDOOR SEAT CUSHIONS BLOWN 1 BLOCK AWAY. MOST DAMAGE OCCURRED ON ELLIS, MILLER, KILBOURNE, VLIET AND LINCOLN STREETS. TIME ESTIMATED.
